message:
fix(messaging,stream): return full AckResolution from consumer actor and implement Error for BroadcastStreamRecvError

src/messaging/consumer.rs:
- Change ConsumerReply::Ack to return Result<AckResolution, _> instead of
  Result<ObligationId, _>, giving callers the full resolution (committed vs
  stale no-op) rather than just the obligation ID

src/stream/broadcast_stream.rs:
- Implement Display and Error traits for BroadcastStreamRecvError, enabling
  use in ? chains and error reporting contexts
- Add Display/Error trait assertions to existing test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
